Sense.Example: article thirteen (13) of the Constitution of Louisiana

Sense.Definition: For what cause, reason, or purpose

Sense.Example: the Interim Constitution was amended ten times

Sense.Definition: joins words and sentence parts together

Sense.Example: Solomon is said to have written three thousand proverbs, and those contained in this book may be a selection from these

Sense.Definition: Concerning, with regard to, on the subject of
Sense.Example: Let's get serious about plagiarism

Sense.Definition: word denoting something already mentioned, or assumed to be known
Sense.Example: Did you see my car over there? The exterior was spray-painted red yesterday.

Sense.Definition: In the (same) way or manner that; to the (same) degree that
Sense.Example: it is hereby ordered as follows
for 50 years after the year of first publication

Sense.Definition: enclosing in a circle or other curve
in a variety of places within an enclosed space
into the middle of an object and out again
used to indicate that something happens or is the case even though there is an obstacle, difficulty, or another opposing factor
one or the other of a pair
On the outside of, not inside
Sense.Example: This work is in the public domain in some countries and areas outside the United Kingdom, including the United States.

Sense.Definition: in spite of, occurring even with some contrary indicator
used to express surprise, interest, or alarm, or to command attention
deliberately incorrect version of “who” or “whom”, used humorously in place of those words
Sense.Example: Yes, even though she’s one of the YouTubers whomst is bad.

Sense.Definition: a certain proportion of, at least one
an unspecified quantity or number of
a certain; an unspecified or unknown
pronoun used to refer reflexively to a hypothetical or generic person
reply to something negative happening, expressing one's panic or disappointment
of a mix of warmed or chilled alcohol, optionally including ingredient
a representation of the bark of a dog
representing an abrupt, typically hollow-sounding, heavy thumping noise, as of a blow, or one hard or unyielding object striking another
without excusing oneself or saying one is sorry
person spoken to or written to
Sense.Example: You, in the red shirt: what's your name?
All 20 of you forgot to do your homework.

Sense.Definition: anyone, one; unspecified individual or group of individuals
female person or animal previously mentioned or implied
person whose gender is unknown or irrelevant
indicates the composition of a given collective or quantitative noun
Sense.Example: a group of students

Sense.Definition: indicates an ancestral source or origin of descent
links entities which are related by a form of belonging or pertinence from one to the other
expressed using a particular language (natural or artificial), or some other formal representation
in a relative position on the other side of a boundary
an uncertain or unspecified thing; one thing
in physical opposition to, or in collision with
interjection used to express contempt or disapproval
someone with whom the speaker has a measure of emotional closeness and respect
recommendation for greater sophistication or awareness: "get real"
more in addition to someone or something
something different to an aforementioned someone or something
(expression of emotional pain, unhappy surprise, disappointment)
(expression of sympathy with the pain of another)
(third-person singular impersonal possessive) belonging to it
at the fore of, ahead of
deep in past time; long ago
(third-person singular reflexive personal pronoun used with female human or anthropomorphized referrents)
speakers/writers, or the speaker/writer and at least one other person
Sense.Example: so we believe there should be a highway leading directly from this Department to every school house in Michigan

Sense.Definition: speaker(s)/writer(s) and the person(s) being addressed
intended to belong to, or be used by, or be used in connection with
with the object or purpose of
under; closer to the ground than

Sense.Example: She found it was tucked under the desk

Sense.Definition: relation of heirarchy, authority, or importance
Sense.Example: While under the supervision of his mentor

Sense.Definition: metaphysics term designating all that exists
in the inner part, spatially; physically inside
up to a point in time
God willing (used mainly by Muslims or in Islamic contexts)
used to express surprise, interest, or alarm, or to command attention
that’s mine! I want a share!
(gender-neutral singular pronoun in all grammatical persons)
at a pace of about 120 steps per minute

Sense.Example: It was a nice man who helped us.

Sense.Definition: the number 3 between two and four
single person, previously mentioned, of unknown or non-binary gender
group of people, animals, plants or objects previously mentioned
(first-person singular personal pronoun) speaker or writer of a sentence
Sense.Example: That belongs to me, not you.
I am Ozymandias, King of Kings!

Sense.Definition: referring to the situation in general
(word used with the present form of a verb to mark it as being an infinitive)
referring to a thing or things that exist
A word used to show agreement or acceptance.
affirmative option provided in a binary vote
spatial position in relation to two objects, on each side of the subject
within the interior of something, closest to the center or to a specific point of reference
Expression of awe, terror, surprise or astonishment
interjection used as an expression of surprise, fear, or astonishment
used to make a polite request
Used as an affirmative to an offer
be quiet(er); stop talking or making noise, or make less noise
a colloquial or informal way to say goodbye or farewell
one of two equal parts of
(reflexive third-person singular impersonal pronoun) of its own self
after a certain amount of time
(exclamation of pleasurable anticipation for the taste of food)
of consitional allowance for the present
on account of; by reason of
Originally and chiefly in children's speech: an exclamation used after two people utter the same word or phrase in the same moment
to one another; one to the other
you and people of your kind
medical imaging procedure using X-rays to produce cross-sectional images
the number between four and six
Sense.Example: The five books of Moses were collectively called the Pentateuch, a word of Greek origin meaning "the five-fold book."

Sense.Definition: used to indicate starting point, temporally or spatially
Sense.Example: A history of public transportation in Kansas City, from cable cars to buses and beyond

Sense.Definition: the whole amount, quantity, or extent of
every member or individual component of
for the reason that; the fact that
over; higher than; further away from the ground than
on the other side of, further
ten to the power of googol
final, ultimate, coming after all others of its kind
expressing a desire for something to depart
goodbye, likely for a long time
(to do with position or direction) in, on, at, by, towards, onto
(to do with time) each, per, in, on, by
in an unsuspected manner; without being suspected
individual person as the object of his or her own reflective consciousness
interjection used to express disdain or reproach
(used to emphasize the truth of a statement)
expression of encouragement prior to a performance
interjection meaning "As long as you're healthy [you can be happy]."
(reflexive pronoun for the first person singular)
(a colloquial American plural form of the second person plural pronoun)
in positive contexts; different, the other of two alternatives, an additional
(reflexive second-person singular) that which belongs to thee
(third person possessive singular; belonging to a female being)
(third-person singular reflexive personal pronoun used with male human or anthropomorphized referrents)
(introduces relative clause involving people or a group)
ship ahoy! (exclamation said when another ship is in view)
informal expression used to get attention or greet someone

Sense.Example: An yttrium sulfate compound is generally soluble.

Sense.Definition: (introduces a clause which is the subject or object of a verb)
phrase used when someone is leaving
used to warn of a falling tree
linguistic particle used to show agreement, acceptance, consensus, appreciation or an affirmative opinion
affirmative option provided in a binary vote

Sense.Example: I wanted to attend the concert, for it featured my favorite band.
She prepared thoroughly for the meeting was crucial to her career.

Sense.Definition: used to tell someone, especially a child, to be quiet
used as an exclamation to express surprise, taunting, exultation, etc.
an interjection used to rub a good joke in someone's face or cheer yourself on after a personal win
The thing, item, etc. being indicated.
Sense.Example: This is a pronoun.

Sense.Definition: used to express discontent or dismay
prepare for an immediate event about to happen

Sense.Example: Preparations for their departure out of Egypt

Sense.Definition: that which shares attributes with another or with itself at another time
(reflexive third-person plural pronoun) of their own self
oops; sorry, I just let off
male person or animal already known or implied
person whose gender is unknown or irrelevant
The (thing) here (used in indicating something or someone nearby).
Sense.Example: This word is a determiner.

Sense.Definition: The known (thing) (used in indicating something or someone just mentioned).
The known (thing) (used in indicating something or someone about to be mentioned).
A known (thing) (used in first mentioning a person or thing that the speaker does not think is known to the audience). Compare with "a certain ...".
(of a time reference) Designates the current or next instance. Cf. next.
The (thing, person, idea, etc) indicated or understood from context, especially if more remote physically, temporally or mentally than one designated as "this", or if expressing distinction.
Sense.Example: That pronoun is different with this determiner.

Sense.Definition: indicating a location for an event
concept denoting the absence of something, and is associated with nothingness;(in nontechnical) things lacking importance, interest, value, relevance, or significance
up to a certain point in time
phrase used when someone is leaving

Sense.Example: Thou shalt not steal

Sense.Definition: that is perfect; that is it
narrative technique of beginning a story at the beginning of the events
at the time of the action of the following clause
Sense.Example: The show will begin when I get there.

Sense.Definition: anything (sometimes indicates the speaker doesn't care about options)
before, until (indicating relation to a position in time)
(indicating application of or benefactive relationship with)
in addition to what has been said previously
an imitation or representation of the grunt of a pig
an expression of surprise, shock, etc.
used to wish someone the best of luck and that events will turn out in favorably
stay still (for a moment); exclamatory expression
consitent of, having been created from
interjection used to express surprise, anger, or extreme displeasure
initialism ostensibly standing for Fucked Up (or variations like Fouled Up) Beyond All Repair or Recognition
the number 4 between three and five
In addition to; as an accessory to
item(s) that are separate and distinct from the item(s) under consideration
at least one item of a set
indicating something that is far away from both the speaker and the listener
Sense.Example: That is a determiner.

Sense.Definition: when something does not go your way
when you see something you are impressed by
you; person spoken to or written to
anyone, one; unspecified individual or group of individuals
(relexive pronoun for the second person) that which belongs to you
neither of two persons or things
(third-person singular masculine personal possessive) belonging to him
representing a brief resonant sound, as of a blow
among a group of two or more
sailor’s cry in heaving and hauling

Synset.Definition: For what cause, reason, or purpose
joins words and sentence parts together
Concerning, with regard to, on the subject of
word denoting something already mentioned, or assumed to be known
In the (same) way or manner that; to the (same) degree that
enclosing in a circle or other curve
in a variety of places within an enclosed space
into the middle of an object and out again
used to indicate that something happens or is the case even though there is an obstacle, difficulty, or another opposing factor
one or the other of a pair
On the outside of, not inside
in spite of, occurring even with some contrary indicator
used to express surprise, interest, or alarm, or to command attention
deliberately incorrect version of “who” or “whom”, used humorously in place of those words

God willing (used mainly by Muslims or in Islamic contexts)

that’s mine! I want a share!
(gender-neutral singular pronoun in all grammatical persons)

the number 3 between two and four

group of people, animals, plants or objects previously mentioned
(first-person singular personal pronoun) speaker or writer of a sentence

referring to a thing or things that exist

(of a time reference) Designates the current or next instance. Cf. next.
The (thing, person, idea, etc) indicated or understood from context, especially if more remote physically, temporally or mentally than one designated as "this", or if expressing distinction.
